message:
Add structured auth diagnostics and expand CompatConfig with deep-merge

src/error.rs — Structured auth diagnostic codes:
- AuthDiagnosticCode enum with 12 stable machine-readable codes
  (auth.missing_api_key, auth.oauth.token_exchange_failed,
  config.azure.missing_deployment, etc.) for programmatic error
  handling by callers and extension error-translation layers
- AuthDiagnostic struct carrying code, remediation text, and
  redaction policy for safe logging of auth failures
- Error::auth_diagnostic() classifies Auth and Provider error
  variants via message-content heuristics into diagnostic codes
- Error::hints() now enriches output with diagnostic code and
  remediation context fields for richer user-facing guidance

src/models.rs — CompatConfig expansion and merge logic:
- 6 new CompatConfig fields: supports_tools, supports_streaming,
  supports_parallel_tool_calls, system_role_name, stop_reason_field,
  custom_headers (extra HTTP headers per provider/model)
- New merge_compat() replaces simple or_else fallback: model-level
  compat fields override provider-level, custom_headers maps are
  deep-merged with model winning on key collision
- Comprehensive test for merge behavior including header deep-merge
- Deserialization round-trip test for new fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
